title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!
